title: DEKTON 9-Inch Torpedo Scaffolders Level with Magnets | 250mm Magnetic Base for Hands-Free Use | Horizontal and Vertical Vials for Precision | Durable Construction with Hanging Hole for Easy Storage
features: Durable Design: The Dekton 9-Inch Torpedo Scaffolders Level is constructed from high-quality materials, ensuring durability and longevity for all your leveling tasks, whether on-site or at home. Its robust build is designed to withstand the rigors of heavy use in various environments.

Strong Magnetic Base: Equipped with a strong magnetic base, this level securely attaches to metal surfaces, allowing for hands-free operation. This feature enhances convenience, enabling you to work efficiently without needing extra support, making it ideal for scaffolding and other construction applications.

Precision Vials: The level includes both horizontal and vertical vials, providing accurate readings for all your leveling needs. The clear, easy-to-read vials ensure precision in alignment, helping you achieve professional results in any project.

Compact and Portable: Measuring 9 inches (250mm), this torpedo level is compact and easy to carry, fitting comfortably in your tool bag or pocket. Its lightweight design allows for easy transport, making it a versatile tool for professionals and DIY enthusiasts alike.

Hanging Hole for Easy Storage: The built-in hanging hole allows for easy storage when not in use. Hang it on a wall or tool organizer to keep your workspace tidy and ensure quick access when you need it. This thoughtful design feature adds to the level's practicality and convenience.
description: The Dekton 9-Inch Torpedo Scaffolders Level is a must-have tool for both professionals and DIY enthusiasts. Constructed from high-quality materials, this durable level is designed to withstand the rigors of construction work and heavy use, ensuring long-lasting reliability. Featuring a strong magnetic base, it securely attaches to metal surfaces for hands-free operation, allowing you to work efficiently and safely. The level includes precision horizontal and vertical vials that provide clear, accurate readings, making alignment tasks straightforward and hassle-free. Measuring 9 inches (250mm), its compact size makes it easy to carry in your tool bag or pocket, perfect for on-the-go projects. The thoughtful design also includes a hanging hole, enabling convenient storage on walls or tool organizers, so it’s always within reach. Whether you're hanging shelves, installing tiles, or setting up scaffolding, the Dekton Torpedo Scaffolders Level is your reliable partner for achieving professional results with ease.
